storyInfo: Jun halts Ya's attack at Savors at Yu's. Ch'en follows the scriptgeists' trail into the library from her dreams, and encounters an unfamiliar relative. Scriptgeists cause a commotion in the Sky Mirror Pavilion, and a fight breaks out.

attributes.content: <p=2>Two days before the day of the full moon, Hour of Ch'en</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: *sigh*... *siiiigh*...
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: What are you sighing for? Does your tooth hurt?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: It's my HEAD that hurts!
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: If you have too much time on your hands, go count the cabbage stock for winter.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Hey—
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: Are you going or not?
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: Going where, when the sun hasn't even climbed above the rooftops?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Don't play the fool with me! The city is almost empty. Why do you stay?
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: Almost means it's not totally empty. Travelers, soldiers on duty, they all need to eat.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Besides, we have someone right here in the restaurant.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: She doesn't count!
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: If you don't go now, there's nothing I can do when the Sui Regulator hears of her visit to this place.
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: I just put the fowlbeast on the grill, and there are another four or five dishes still to be served. There's no rush.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Oh, you're just—!
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: Stop worrying so much, first thing in the morning. Go open the door, if you really have too much time on your hands. It's business as usual for breakfast hours!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: You're bold as a boulder, you know that?
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: What else can I do?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: If you're sleepy, go to bed. If you're hungry, eat something. Who knows when someone might suddenly miss a certain taste? A customer could show up at any moment—
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: See? A customer just showed up.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Take a seat you like! Only the breakfast menu is available right now—
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Oh, it's you.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: I'm not sure what you're asking... I run this place. What else would I be doing?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: You 'people' just keep getting more and more ridiculous.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: Why the rudeness? Insulting the chef before you've taken a single bite?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Keep this up, and I'll kick you out. Even my patience has its limits.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: The frosty individual walks into the restaurant and sits down at the table beside Yu.
What flavors does Savors at Yu's savor?
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: All of them, of course, from sweet to sour to salty to spicy.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: And to get the smell of fire and smoke all over yourself... do you like this?
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: Of course. Can't be a good cook, if you don't like to cook.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I can't speak to anything else, but I'm pretty confident in my cooking.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I could make a couple of dishes for you. On the house.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: One has to taste different flavors in life. Isn't it a waste to be obsessed with a single flavor?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Ah... but I guess I can't really use these words to persuade you.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: They say, 'he who tells others to forgive and forget will be struck by lightning.' Besides, I guess the bad blood between you is pretty thick.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I understand how you feel. Really!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: You have every reason to hate Yan, hate humanity, hate It... and I suppose it's not out of the question for the hatred to last a thousand years.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: But if you keep hating and hating, with nothing to do but let the hate destroy you... is it really worth it?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: You remind me of my brother, come to think of it...
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: You're not afraid of me at all.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: Why should I be?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Beggars, mandarins, even the gods in Heaven and the Feranmuts of legend, they're all customers when they walk into this restaurant.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: You're different from the others...
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: You're unusual, even among your... kind.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: You don't look concerned at all, even when your life is on the line.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: *sigh*... I guess I've gotten used to living in fear. It's been this way for a century.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Your timing isn't great, I have to say. You would really have had a treat, if you had come when the ingredients were still fresh in the kitchen.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Sometimes, all it takes to change your mood is a nice, hot meal. Maybe the things that seemed impossible will solve themselves.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: The buns are ready, chef, but our breakfast sign is gone! Did Blaze—
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: There's actually a customer? At this hour?
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: A Candleholder?
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: All alone... far too arrogant, you are.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: Feeble, ignorant, juvenile... you and these ants.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: Her sword is already raised before She has finished Her sentence.
Stop!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Chef—
attributes.name: Jiang

attributes.content: Like the falling of the judge's gavel, or the crack of thunder in winter.
It is supposed to be a dining table, but it feels like a court of law.
All is silent.
The dining table is no place for swords and bloodshed.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Pick up your chopsticks, if you're here to eat. Don't let good food go to waste.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: And if you're not here to eat, you ought to get out.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Its parts... protect the humans of the Sui Regulator...
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: How ironic.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: We don't need you to tell us how to live our lives.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: On the other hand, I would suggest that you eat something. Hunger tends to make one grumpy.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: The woman quietly pushes a steaming plate of buns in front of Ya.
Enjoy, while it's hot.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: ...Hmph.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: Ya looks coldly at the buns in front of Her, before turning to leave.
You're going?
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: The Shanhaizhong's words were truth mixed with falsehood, but I will get my hands on what she promised to deliver to me.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: As for you... I've met many of Its incarnations, but none who answer my questions straightforwardly. What use is there for you people?
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: I will not say that an eye for an eye is unreasonable, but you should watch your step, in case someone has dug a pit for you.
attributes.name: Dignified Woman

attributes.content: Ridiculous.
attributes.name: Ya

attributes.content: Does She speak of the proxies, the Shanhaizhong, Herself, or the steaming plate of buns in front of Her?
Phew... good thing you showed up, Jun.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: It doesn't seem like She's here for any particular reason. Looks like She's been tricked by someone. Whether I'm here or not doesn't make much of a difference.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: It's not 'us' that She's after.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: ...*sigh*.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: I just feel like She must have led a hard life.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: A road of hardship that only leads to even greater hardship.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Never mind that. Does my second oldest sister have business here in Baizao?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I have an appointment to keep.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: An appointment? How about you sit down and enjoy a meal, if you're not in a hurry—
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I'm afraid it might be a little hard to sit down and enjoy anything...
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Considering the burning smell coming from the kitchen.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Oh no... my roast fowlbeast!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Stop.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: The sound of paulownia seeds striking the ground rings clear through the faint morning autumn wind.
The slender woman in front of her has a nervous expression on her face, seemingly trying to hide her timidity at all costs.
A visitor? When there is a general evacuation order throughout Baizao?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Who are you? What business do you have in the Sky Mirror Pavilion?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: I didn't mean to disturb—do you work here?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You must have seen the strange soldiers all over the city. They seem to have originated here.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Could you please tell me exactly what happened?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The Pavilion does not need an outsider meddling in its affairs. Besides, your identity is unknown, and you have trespassed into this place, armed.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: As Magistrate of Water for the Sky Mirror Pavilion, I cannot allow you to enter, whether it is for the safety of the Pavilion's archives, or for your own safety.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Turn back.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Magistrate of Water... what kind of position is that?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The Sky Mirror Pavilion is the first library of Yan. The Magistrate of Water is responsible for preventing fires.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: What are you doing in the Sky Mirror Pavilion, if you don't even know this?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: I thought... a modern library wouldn't need a specific person to prevent fires anymore.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Indeed, you're right. Smart girl. Now, get out.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: I'm sorry... I mean no offense.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: But I happen to know someone who used to work in Baizao's library...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Who? What's your relationship?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: That's not important. It was many years ago.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: The aloof woman takes a few steps forward, lifting her lantern to look closely at Ch'en's face.
Ch'en instinctively takes a step back.
Enough. Nothing you say will matter.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Leave, if you have no business here. You'll regret it when the gates close.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: But you're the only one here. Are you sure you'll be fine?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: That's none of your business—why do you poke your nose into it?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Honestly... I came to clear out these monsters.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: But when I saw this library, I felt like... like I've seen it in a dream. Like someone intentionally guided me here.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: A dream? Is that the best excuse you can come up with?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: It's not an excuse. Besides, I used to be a cop. I'm familiar with security work.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Please, trust me. Let me participate in the investigation.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You... you're really a police?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Ch'en shows her ID.
You're from Lungmen...
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Ch'en... Hui-chieh.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Ch'en Hui-chieh? What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: Huh...?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Don't think a piece of paper grants you free passage.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: I, Ch'en Chao-ch'ien, am the last of the Ch'ens. Have you come to mock the House of Ch'en? I'll never understand the imperial family's hobbies.
attributes.name: Aloof Woman

attributes.content: That means, you're—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Still playing dumb? Don't you even know who your parents are?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Your family never cared about the husband's side of the family when Princess Yanjing remarried, only to ruin the careers of the entire Ch'en family when she died...
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: What did my cousin do wrong? How could he possibly refuse?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Maybe you don't believe me... I can hardly believe it myself, but no one's ever told me so much about my family like that.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: I thought... I was the only one.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You didn't know? Then why have you come to the Sky Mirror Pavilion?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: They stare at each other wordlessly, as though looking into blurry mirrors.
I'm sorry...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Enough... leave. A few nice words, that's all. You were willing to say them, and I appreciate it. Let's leave it at that.
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: I gave up asking more questions a long time ago. Thunder and rain are both gifts from Heaven. I should be grateful I still have a job—
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: ...Again.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Wh-What? Didn't they disappear...?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Oh no! The books!
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: I'll take you inside. It's faster that way. Excuse me.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Stop! Such gall—w-wait!
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Insolent child—
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Beneath the tall dome, densely packed bookshelves extend as far as the eye can see, reflecting in the floor like a massive, constantly expanding weiqi board.
Ink-colored scriptgeists wander amidst them, scattered like weiqi stones.
This is not good. The monsters here are much stronger than the ones I encountered at the gate.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: It's like they came flowing out of the shelves... what are they?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Not shelves. Pages. Can't you tell?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Pages?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Get back!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hey, don't grab me—
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Fine, I suppose your intentions are righteous.
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: What do you think, Candleholder Zuo? Is the news timely enough for you?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Going straight for the source of the geist trouble—even you Sui Regulator people haven't been able to react yet.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Do you believe me now?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Shut up and give it back!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: The sound of metal clanging against metal.
Sparks fly as blades clash.
Hmph.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Mo Yi clenches her teeth as the soreness spreads from her hand to the rest of her arm.
You blockhead... gotten stronger in the span of just a few days, haven't you?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What do you want, Shanhaizhong bandit?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Don't tell me you haven't noticed something's not right with the Sui Regulator?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What about this doll? Why did you steal it?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: It belongs to a proxy, just like the Book of Kung Fu. I believe... it has something to do with the vanished proxy.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: As for taking it...
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Would you have cooperated and come with me to the Sky Mirror Pavilion, hard-headed as you are, if I didn't?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Out of the way!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: He pushes so hard that it sends the doll in Mo Yi's arms flying.
(Oh no!)
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: You won't—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Blades cross again in the blink of an eye.
The force sends both of them recoiling.
The blades vibrate and hum.
—Look out!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: The bookshelf collapses towards Mo Yi, the shockwave forcing her back.
Stop! STOP!
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: (Who are they...?)
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You're swinging swords at each other when there are still monsters around?! And you toppled an entire shelf of books?!
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Out! GET OUT!
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Wait, be careful—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Hmph...
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: It is unclear who moved first.
The balance is broken, and chaos breaks out.
Mo Yi turns towards the charging Magistrate of Water, angling her wrist to point her sword at her foe's shoulder.
Zuo Le's swing misses Mo Yi by inches, cutting the red rope tied to the wooden lock.
Stand back!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en has no time to pull Ch'en Chao-ch'ien back. Almost by instinct, she draws Chi Xiao, and barely parries an attack, without even seeing who made it.
Sparks fly amidst the poorly lit bookshelves, accompanied by the piercing sound of clashing metal.
Huh?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Mo Yi grabs Ch'en Chao-ch'ien by the collar and pulls her away from the scuffle.
Ch'en steps forward, her blade leading the way.
Zuo Le stands his ground—
Stop!
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: The girl holds up the petite form of the Magistrate of Water, and turns her blade around.
(No! The token!)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You! Give the wooden lock back!
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Stop, all of you! Don't hurt the innocent!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You're... Lord Wei's niece?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Why is the token in your hands, Miss Ch'en? This is important to the Sui Regulator. You must return it at once!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Lower your weapon!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: What a mess...
attributes.name: Mo Yi
